production_assistant.technical_quality_notes: Audio is clear and consistent. Pacing slows significantly during inventory management and planning phases, leading to a high density of 'uh' fillers. Combat sequences show excellent focus with minimal vocal clutter.
thematic_silence: 0:02:38 - Focused tree felling and log dodging
0:12:42 - Silent chest organization and treasure sorting
0:16:52 - Inventory management before the boss journey

strategic_analyst.safety_protocol_notes: Excellent use of the 'Shieldmaiden’s Rule'. The player established a secondary Othala (respawn house) near the altar, ensuring a quick recovery if the Norns' Trial (death) occurred during the boss fight.
highlight_gold: 0:53:45 - The fall of the first Forsaken (Eikthyr)
1:02:10 - Activating the first Forsaken Power at the Stones
1:27:23 - Forging the Antler Pickaxe to begin the Bronze Age
strategic_analyst.strategic_growth_goal: Transitioning from the safety of the Meadows to the Shadow-Garth to extract Stone-Marrow (Copper/Tin) and advance the saga.
